tool_args.label: Webster Avenue Select Bus Service
tool_args.raw_text: Webster Avenue Select Bus Service. Presentation to Community Board 7 | March 14, 2013

payload.description: Proposed Select Bus Service along Webster Avenue from The Hub to Williamsbridge, replacing the Bx41 Limited. Features include 4 miles of offset bus lanes, bus bulb stations, off-board fare collection, low-floor buses, transit signal priority, and pedestrian safety improvements.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Webster Avenue Select Bus Service
